title: Trust Signals
description: Schema for computed trust signals that combine provenance, evaluation, code health, publisher reputation, community feedback, and operational metrics into a composite trust score.

compositeScore.description: Weighted composite trust score between 0 (no trust) and 1 (full trust). Computed from all component scores.

components.description: Individual trust signal components with their scores, weights, and details.

overrides.description: Manual adjustments to the computed trust score, with audit trail.

calculatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the trust score was last calculated.

TrustComponents.description: The six trust signal components. Weights must sum to 1.0.

provenance.description: Trust derived from supply-chain provenance (SLSA level, signatures, SBOM). Weight: 0.25.

evaluation.description: Trust derived from evaluation results and benchmark performance. Weight: 0.25.

codeHealth.description: Trust derived from code quality metrics (test coverage, linting, vulnerability scanning). Weight: 0.20.

publisherReputation.description: Trust derived from the publisher's track record and verification status. Weight: 0.15.

community.description: Trust derived from community adoption and feedback. Weight: 0.10.

operational.description: Trust derived from runtime operational metrics (uptime, error rates). Weight: 0.05.

TrustComponent.description: A single trust signal component with score, weight, and metadata.

weight.description: Weight of this component in the composite score.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this component was last computed.

ProvenanceDetails.description: Detail fields for the provenance trust component.

sbomAvailable.description: Whether an SBOM is available and valid.

EvaluationDetails.description: Detail fields for the evaluation trust component, including safety and adversarial testing coverage.

categoryCoverage.description: Which evaluation categories have been covered.

safety.description: Whether safety evaluations exist (toxicity, bias, harm prevention).

redTeam.description: Whether adversarial red-team evaluations exist (prompt injection, jailbreaking, PII extraction).

safetyScore.description: Aggregate score across safety-category eval records. Null if no safety evals exist.

redTeamScore.description: Aggregate score across red-team-category eval records. Null if no red-team evals exist.

lastEvaluated.description: When the most recent evaluation was performed.

evaluationFreshness.description: Whether evaluations are current relative to the artifact version.

CodeHealthDetails.description: Detail fields for the code health trust component.

lintingPassed.description: Whether the code passes linting checks.

dependencyFreshness.description: Fraction of dependencies that are up-to-date.

PublisherReputationDetails.description: Detail fields for the publisher reputation trust component.

verified.description: Whether the publisher's identity has been verified.

publishedArtifactCount.description: Number of artifacts published by this publisher.

accountAge.description: How long the publisher account has existed (e.g., '2y3m').

incidentHistory.description: Number of security incidents associated with this publisher.

CommunityDetails.description: Detail fields for the community trust component.

activeUsers.description: Number of active users in the last 30 days.

issueResponseTime.description: Median time to respond to issues (e.g., '4h', '2d').

OperationalDetails.description: Detail fields for the operational trust component.

TrustOverride.description: Manual adjustment to a trust score with audit trail.

component.description: Which component (or composite score) is being overridden.

adjustment.description: Score adjustment (can be positive or negative).

appliedBy.description: Identity of the person or system that applied the override.

appliedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the override was applied.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration time for the override.
